name: Multiple groups with consented flow (CRITICAL)
description: CRITICAL: Tests consented flow through path involving multiple groups. This is the HIGHEST RISK scenario type - the January 2026 isPermittedFlow bug occurred in multi-group paths. Source is a large group (1552 members) with consented flow enabled, transferring to another group (1035 members).
notes: This scenario type caused the January 2026 isPermittedFlow bug. Multi-group + consented flow is the most complex path type. Must pass Anvil execution.
